texto: Water shapes its course according to the nature of the ground over which it flows
autor: the soldier works out his victory in relation to the foe whom he is facing.
explicacao: Citação de the soldier works out his victory in relation to the foe whom he is facing. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Water shapes its course according to the nature of the ground over which it flows” articula reflexao, sun-tzu, the-art-of-war em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-art-of-war.
